findings.location: s1 — CODE_NAME テーブルのデータ例
findings.description: The knowledge file omits the English (en) language rows from the CODE_NAME example table. The source contains 14 rows total (7 ja + 7 en), but the knowledge file only includes the 7 ja rows. The en rows are substantive: they show that SORT_ORDER can differ per language (e.g., 0001-01 has SORT_ORDER=1 in ja but SORT_ORDER=2 in en), which demonstrates multilingual behavior that could affect implementation decisions.
findings.source_evidence: Source CODE_NAME table includes rows: 0001/01/2/en/Male/M/0001-01-en, 0001/02/1/en/Female/F/0001-02-en, plus 5 more en rows for 0002 entries.
